languages.text: "Моя душа не слышит криков, ведьма. Лишь... тишину. Лишенную надежды и жизни. Холод вечности, предвещающий беду".
languages.translation_comment: Reacts with caution to the fact that the demons whispering in Idira's head are themselves frightened

languages.original_text: "My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."

languages.text: "My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."
languages.original_text: "Моя душа не слышит криков, ведьма. Лишь... тишину. Лишенную надежды и жизни. Холод вечности, предвещающий беду".

traits.locale_text: "My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."
"My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."
"My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."

languages.text: «Mi alma no oye gritos, bruja. Solo... silencio. Carente de esperanza y vida. Es la frialdad de la eternidad, un augurio calamitoso».
languages.original_text: "My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."

traits.locale_text: «Mi alma no oye gritos, bruja. Solo... silencio. Carente de esperanza y vida. Es la frialdad de la eternidad, un augurio calamitoso».

languages.text: “我的灵魂没听见什么尖叫，女巫。只有……死寂。没有希望，没有生机。那是预示灾难降临的永世之寒。”
languages.original_text: "My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."

traits.locale_text: “我的灵魂没听见什么尖叫，女巫。只有……死寂。没有希望，没有生机。那是预示灾难降临的永世之寒。”

languages.text: « Mon cœur n'entend aucune voix, sorcière. Seulement... le silence. Dépourvu d'espoir, de vie. C'est comme un mauvais présage surgi des tréfonds de l'éternité... »
languages.original_text: "My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."

traits.locale_text: « Mon cœur n'entend aucune voix, sorcière. Seulement... le silence. Dépourvu d'espoir, de vie. C'est comme un mauvais présage surgi des tréfonds de l'éternité... »

languages.text: "Benim ruhum çığlık duymuyor cadı. Tek duyduğu... Sessizlik. Umuttan ve hayattan yoksun. Felaketin habercisi olan sonsuzluğun soğukluğu."
languages.original_text: "My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."

traits.locale_text: "Benim ruhum çığlık duymuyor cadı. Tek duyduğu... Sessizlik. Umuttan ve hayattan yoksun. Felaketin habercisi olan sonsuzluğun soğukluğu."

languages.text: 「我が魂には、叫びなど聞こえぬ、魔女よ。ただ……静寂のみ。希望も生命も欠いた静寂。災厄を予兆する、永遠の冷たさだ」
languages.original_text: "My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."

traits.locale_text: 「我が魂には、叫びなど聞こえぬ、魔女よ。ただ……静寂のみ。希望も生命も欠いた静寂。災厄を予兆する、永遠の冷たさだ」

languages.text: "Mein Seele hört keine Schreie, Hexe. Nur ... Stille. Ohne Hoffnung und Leben. Die Kälte der Ewigkeit, die Unheil verkündet."
languages.original_text: "My soul hears no screams, witch. Only... silence. Devoid of hope and life. The coldness of eternity that presages calamity."

traits.locale_text: "Mein Seele hört keine Schreie, Hexe. Nur ... Stille. Ohne Hoffnung und Leben. Die Kälte der Ewigkeit, die Unheil verkündet."
